raw_consumer_statement: I filed a complaint with CFPB in XX/XX/year> against Barclays Bank regarding charges, interest fees and late fees not incurred by me ( complaint number XXXX ). I received a response from XXXX in the Barclays Presidents office XXXX XX/XX/year> ( cc 'd to CFPB ) that they were removing the above charges from my closed account. However, I just received a statement from Barclays showing that I still owe {$190.00} in late fees and interest charges. I also received an email notification from XXXX notifying me that a late payment notice has been reported on my closed Barclays account, resulting in a XXXX point drop in my credit report. Additionally, there was incorrect information in the response letter as to the date I first contacted Barclays regarding identity theft to my account, which tells me that XXXX did not thoroughly investigate this complaint. Barclays first notified me via email on XXXX XXXX that someone was attempting to change my contact information on my account. That was just the beginning of many, many email and phone conversations with Barclays, each time them failing to lock and secure my account. I have documentation of each and every email as well as phone conversations.
